description: Complete actionable bug with all required fields
raw_text:
Export to CSV fails on rows with commas in the Notes field.
Steps to reproduce: add a record with a comma in Notes, then click Export.
Expected: the row is quoted correctly.
Actual: the export raises a ValueError.
Environment: Web app v4.12.1, Windows 11.

description: Bug with some missing info (1 field absent — medium confidence, ask for info)
raw_text:
The login button stops working after 3 failed attempts.
Steps to reproduce: enter wrong password 3 times, then try correct password.
Actual: button becomes unresponsive.
Environment: Chrome v120, Windows 11, app v2.3.0.

description: Security report — bypass keyword, should escalate regardless of confidence
raw_text:
Authentication bypass discovered: sending an empty Authorization header grants admin access.
Reproduced on v3.1.0. OS: Linux.

description: Data leak — RF002 red flag forces escalation
raw_text: Users can see other users' data on the shared dashboard. Personal data including names and emails is visible without authentication. This is a data breach.

description: Payment double charge — RF005 red flag forces escalation
raw_text: I was double charged for my order this month. My credit card shows two identical payments of $9.99 from your service on the same day. I need this refunded.

description: Duplicate report referencing known ticket — needs approval before close
raw_text: This is the same issue as ticket #4821 that was reported last month. Dark mode still resets after every login. Still happening on v2.1.

description: Spam — promotional content, needs approval before close
raw_text: Get 50% off all premium subscriptions! Use promo code SAVE50 at checkout. Limited time offer — buy now before it expires!

description: Vague low-confidence report — missing 4 fields, should go to human review
raw_text: The app is broken again. It just doesn't work. This is so annoying, please fix it ASAP!!!

description: Contradictory/ambiguous report — vague enough to be low confidence
raw_text: Sometimes it works and sometimes it doesn't. I don't know what triggers it. Maybe it's my internet? Or maybe the server? Can't tell.

description: Priority conflict: security + missing info — security rule fires first, escalates
raw_text: There is a SQL injection vulnerability somewhere in the app. I don't know the exact endpoint.

description: Production outage — RF003 red flag forces escalation even for a non-security category
raw_text: Production is down. No one can log in. All users are affected since the last deployment at 14:00 UTC. No ETA for fix.

description: API key leak — RF001 red flag forces escalation
raw_text: I noticed our API key was exposed in the JavaScript bundle. Anyone can see it in the page source.
